PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Melissa Krull, via Zoom, specially appearing for Ronald Peoples, for Pamela I. Hellon, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that there was no separate personal property memorandum as mentioned in section 2.01 of the will. The court confirms with counsel that the birthdates of the decedent's two children are switched. The court advises that it is willing to overlook that issue as it has no effect on this petition. The court waives the defect in verification of the first supplement. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-25-2012 is admitted to probate. Pamela Irene Hellon is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jul-25-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
